mapper.update: update t_order set status = 10, update_time = now() where order_id = #{orderId} and status = 0
update t_order set update_time = now(),pay_time = now(),status = 20,out_trade_no = #{outTradeNo} where order_id = #{orderId} and status = 10

update t_order set receiver_name = "***", receiver_phone = concat(left(receiver_phone,3),"****",right(receiver_phone,4)), receiver_address = "***", update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId} and receiver_name != "***"
mapper.select: select status from t_order where user_id = #{userId} and order_id = #{orderId}

select order_id,order_no,user_id,total_amount,freight_amount,discount_amount,pay_amount,status,receiver_name, receiver_phone,receiver_address,pay_channel,out_trade_no,pay_time,ship_time,finish_time,cancel_time, remark,is_deleted,create_time,update_time from t_order where order_id = #{orderId}

select order_id,order_no,user_id,total_amount,freight_amount,discount_amount,pay_amount,status,receiver_name, receiver_phone,receiver_address,pay_channel,out_trade_no,pay_time,ship_time,finish_time,cancel_time, remark,is_deleted,create_time,update_time from t_order where user_id = #{userId} and is_deleted = 0 order by create_time desc
